formula_expression: base obs window ∩ flight window / flight window
meaning: Fraction of the drone flight covered by base observations. Must equal 1.0; any less means PPK gaps.
Seconds the base was recording before flight start. Threshold ≥120s ideal, ≥60s acceptable.
Seconds the base kept recording after flight end. Threshold ≥60s.
Whether dual-frequency data is available (better ambiguity resolution, iono mitigation).
Total cycle slips. Elevated = obstruction/disturbance/multipath.
Short recording gaps.
Any major recording gap.
Mean signal strength across the session.

formula_expression: std-dev of cn0_per_sat across sats at equal elevation
meaning: Proxy for multipath from a fixed reflector geometry. Risk indicator, not an error magnitude.

formula_expression: mean of pdop_per_epoch during flight window
meaning: Average sky-geometry quality.

formula_expression: max of pdop_per_epoch during flight window
meaning: Worst-case geometry.

formula_expression: time from power-on to stable sat_count
meaning: How quickly the base reached a stable solution.
Whether the RINEX version is accepted by the PPK pipeline (#10).
Whether antenna type, receiver type, approx position are present in the header (#10).
Number of constellations the base tracked. Base-side input to #16 cross-check.

formula_expression: completed_normally AND shutdowns==0 AND battery_min adequate
meaning: Whether the session terminated cleanly with adequate power. Degrades to unconfirmed if Operation Log absent/null.
Whether the operator-entered antenna model matches the RINEX header type. Type consistency, NOT ANTEX calibration (#21).
Whether the form height agrees with the RINEX-recorded ARP height. Agreement raises confidence; conflict flags the wrong-reference blunder (#1).

formula_expression: NOAA SWPC Kp at session time
meaning: Geomagnetic activity index. High Kp + single-freq = degraded accuracy (#20). External dependency.

formula_expression: gap_gt_5s_count↑ AND cycle_slip_count↑ AND cn0 variance↑ co-occurring
meaning: Correlation detector for physical base disturbance (#7). FLAG-ONLY, no weight. BLIND to slow settling that produces no gap/slip.
Whether the flight falls inside this base log (#15). FLAG-ONLY. Guards wrong multi-flight log matching.
Internal device-clock vs observation end cross-check (#17 cross). Disagreement = silent truncation.

formula_expression: approx_position_xyz is autonomous (always true at S1)
meaning: Records that the base position is an autonomous seed (#3). NON-scoring; judgement deferred to pre-processing.
Risk signal for unstable/unverified benchmark (#2). NON-scoring warning + monument_id handoff to Learning Engine (#13).
